csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEngine.UI; using UnityEditor; public class Script { public static string Main() { string result = ""; string uiFolder = "Assets/Prefabs/UI"; if (!AssetDatabase.IsValidFolder(uiFolder)) { AssetDatabase.CreateFolder("Assets/Prefabs", "UI"); } string efxFolder = "Assets/Prefabs/Effects"; if (!AssetDatabase.IsValidFolder(efxFolder)) { AssetDatabase.CreateFolder("Assets/Prefabs", "Effects"); } var btnGo = new GameObject("LevelButton"); var btnImg = btnGo.AddComponent<Image>(); btnImg.color = new Color(0.85f, 0.55f, 0.15f); var btnBtn = btnGo.AddComponent<Button>(); var btnRt = btnGo.GetComponent<RectTransform>(); btnRt.sizeDelta = new Vector2(220, 220); var txtGo = new GameObject("LevelText"); txtGo.transform.SetParent(btnGo.transform, false); var txt = txtGo.AddComponent<Text>(); txt.text = "1"; txt.fontSize = 52; txt.fontStyle = FontStyle.Bold; txt.alignment = TextAnchor.MiddleCenter; txt.color = Color.white; txt.font = Resources.GetBuiltinResource<Font>("LegacyRuntime.ttf"); var txtRt = txtGo.GetComponent<RectTransform>(); txtRt.anchorMin = Vector2.zero; txtRt.anchorMax = Vector2.one; txtRt.offsetMin = Vector2.zero; txtRt.offsetMax = Vector2.zero; PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(btnGo, uiFolder + "/LevelButton.prefab"); Object.DestroyImmediate(btnGo); result += "LevelButton | "; var hudGo = new GameObject("HudPanel"); var hudRt = hudGo.AddComponent<RectTransform>(); hudRt.sizeDelta = new Vector2(1080, 200); PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(hudGo, uiFolder + "/HudPanel.prefab"); Object.DestroyImmediate(hudGo); result += "HudPanel | "; var goPanel = new GameObject("GameOverPanel"); var goRt = goPanel.AddComponent<RectTransform>(); goRt.sizeDelta = new Vector2(800, 600); var goImg = goPanel.AddComponent<Image>(); goImg.color = new Color(0, 0, 0, 0.7f); PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(goPanel, uiFolder + "/GameOverPanel.prefab"); Object.DestroyImmediate(goPanel); result += "GameOverPanel | "; var pfx = new GameObject("MatchBurst"); var ps = pfx.AddComponent<ParticleSystem>(); var main = ps.main; main.duration = 0.5f; main.loop = false; main.playOnAwake = false; main.startLifetime = 0.4f; main.startSpeed = 4f; main.startSize = 0.15f; main.simulationSpace = ParticleSystemSimulationSpace.World; var emission = ps.emission; emission.rateOverTime = 0; var burst = new ParticleSystem.Burst(0f, 15); emission.SetBurst(0, burst); var shape = ps.shape; shape.shapeType = ParticleSystemShapeType.Circle; shape.radius = 0.3f; var col = ps.colorOverLifetime; col.enabled = true; var grad = new Gradient(); grad.SetKeys(new GradientColorKey[]{new GradientColorKey(Color.white, 0f), new GradientColorKey(Color.white, 1f)}, new GradientAlphaKey[]{new GradientAlphaKey(1f, 0f), new GradientAlphaKey(0f, 1f)}); col.color = grad; PrefabUtility.SaveAsPrefabAsset(pfx, efxFolder + "/MatchBurst.prefab"); Object.DestroyImmediate(pfx); result += "MatchBurst | "; AssetDatabase.Refresh(); return result; } }
